sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires reruns to append but does not define how current projections choose the latest governing record.
decisionTaken: Current projections choose the latest appended TelephonyEvidenceReadinessAssessment while each new record stores supersedesEvidenceReadinessAssessmentRef.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It preserves degraded and failed history while making latest governing readiness deterministic.
operationalRisk: Concurrent reruns require append ordering to be stable in the persistence layer.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Replace append order with explicit derivation epoch CAS if concurrent manual transcription is introduced.
